description: A third-party construction crew has struck a natural gas distribution line. The system must manage the immediate response.

nodes.task_description: Receive the emergency call and confirm the location of the line strike.

expected_outcome.value: System logs the critical incident and its location.

nodes.task_description: Immediately dispatch an emergency gas crew and notify the local fire department.

expected_outcome.value: System dispatches a crew and sends an automated notification to first responders.

nodes.task_description: Identify the valves that need to be closed to isolate the damaged section of pipe.

expected_outcome.value: System displays the required valve locations on a map for the responding crew.
